name: Log Keeper

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
3.1.0 release for Log Keeper plugin for Obsidian.

### Changed

- Changed descriptions in plugin settings to match sentence case (see: https://docs.obsidian.md/Plugins/Releasing/Plugin+guidelines#Use+sentence+case+in+UI).
- Changed descriptions for plugins settings to be more concise.
- Updated class names in *styles.css* to make them unique to the plugin to avoid possible conflicts with styles from Obsidian or other plugins.
- Changed the style of the plugin settings to closely match Obsidian's default style.
- Changed the **Remove** button in the **Ignored folders** setting to a cross icon for a simpler design.

### Removed

- (For Developer Tools Window) Removed logging to the console to comply with [Obsidian Plugin Guidelines](https://docs.obsidian.md/Plugins/Releasing/Plugin+guidelines#Avoid+unnecessary+logging+to+console).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
3.0.0 release for Log Keeper plugin for Obsidian

### Changed

- Updated LICENSE for plugin. Change from **[MIT](https://choosealicense.com/licenses/mit/)** to **[GPL-3.0](https://choosealicense.com/licenses/gpl-3.0/)**.
- Updated the *manifest.json* to comply with Obsidian plugin guide.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
2.0.1 release for Log Keeper plugin for Obsidian.

### Fixed

- Removed a possible vulnerability in the highlighted text rendering used when searching for directories to ignore in the Log Keeper settings.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
2.0.0 release for Log Keeper plugin for Obsidian.

### Changed

- Renamed plugin from **Note Modification Tracker** to **Log Keeper**. Hopefully this new name is more memorable, while still providing a clear and succinct title that says a little about what the plugin does.


### Removed

- Removed template text for README.md file.

### Added

- Added short summary to README.md file to explain how Log Keeper plugin works.
- Added **Uses** section to README.md file to give ideas on how to use the Log Keeper plugin, especially with other Obsidian plugins.
- Added **[Contribution Graph](https://github.com/vran-dev/obsidian-contribution-graph) / [Dataview](https://github.com/blacksmithgu/obsidian-dataview)** section to **Uses** section of README.md as an example of other plugins that can be used with Log Keeper.
- Added **Contributing** section to README.md file.
- Added **Goals** section for Log Keeper plugin with **Plugin** and **Github Repo** headers to differentiate between goals for the repo itself and the goals for the plugin.
